items.title: Show HN: Han – A Korean programming language written in Rust
items.content:
A few weeks ago I saw a post about someone converting an entire C++ codebase to Rust using AI in under two weeks.

That inspired me — if AI can rewrite a whole language stack that fast, I wanted to try building a programming language from scratch with AI assistance.

I've also been noticing growing global interest in Korean language and culture, and I wondered: what would a programming language look like if every keyword was in Hangul (the Korean writing system)?

Han is the result. It's a statically-typed language written in Rust with a full compiler pipeline (lexer → parser → AST → interpreter + LLVM IR codegen).

It supports arrays, structs with impl blocks, closures, pattern matching, try/catch, file I/O, module imports, a REPL, and a basic LSP server.

This is a side project, not a "you should use this instead of Python" pitch. Feedback on language design, compiler architecture, or the Korean keyword choices is very welcome.

https://github.com/xodn348/han

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47381382

Points: 184

# Comments: 101
items.contentSnippet:
A few weeks ago I saw a post about someone converting an entire C++ codebase to Rust using AI in under two weeks.
That inspired me — if AI can rewrite a whole language stack that fast, I wanted to try building a programming language from scratch with AI assistance.
I've also been noticing growing global interest in Korean language and culture, and I wondered: what would a programming language look like if every keyword was in Hangul (the Korean writing system)?
Han is the result. It's a statically-typed language written in Rust with a full compiler pipeline (lexer → parser → AST → interpreter + LLVM IR codegen).
It supports arrays, structs with impl blocks, closures, pattern matching, try/catch, file I/O, module imports, a REPL, and a basic LSP server.
This is a side project, not a "you should use this instead of Python" pitch. 
Feedback on language design, compiler architecture, or the Korean keyword choices is very welcome.
https://github.com/xodn348/han
Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47381382
Points: 184
# Comments: 101
items.creator: xodn348
items.summary: Han是一个用Rust编写的静态类型编程语言，其特点是所有关键字都使用韩文（Hangul）。该语言包含完整的编译器管道（lexer→parser→AST→解释器+LLVM IR代码生成），支持数组、结构体、闭包、模式匹配、异常处理、文件IO、模块导入、REPL和LSP服务器等特性。作者受AI辅助代码转换启发，用AI assistance完成开发，在Hacker News获得184分和101条评论。
items.ai_reason: 用Rust实现完整编译器管道，韩文关键字设计具有创新性，作为个人side project技术深度和完成度都很高

items.title: Mouser: An open source alternative to Logi-Plus mouse software
items.content:
I discovered this project because all-of-a-sudden Logi Options Plus software updater started taking 40-60% of my Intel Macbook Pro until I killed the process (of course it restarts). In my searches I ended up at a reddit discussion where I found other people with same issues.

I'm a minor contributor to this project but it aims to reduce/eliminate the need to use Logitech proprietary software and telemetry. We could use help if other people are interested.

Please check out the github link for more detailed motivations (eliminating telemetry) as a part of this project. Here is link: https://github.com/TomBadash/MouseControl

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47368033

Points: 425

# Comments: 141

items.title: Can I run AI locally?

Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47363754

# Comments: 343
items.creator: ricardbejarano
items.summary: Can I Run AI是一个在线工具网站，帮助用户查询自己的硬件配置（主要是GPU）能否在本地运行各种主流AI大模型。用户只需选择具体的AI模型，网站即可根据其硬件规格给出兼容性判断结果。该工具涵盖了Llama、Stable Diffusion、GPT等热门模型，为想要本地部署AI的用户提供了有价值的参考信息。
items.ai_reason: 实用工具网站，帮助用户检查本地硬件是否能运行各类AI大模型，提供直观的兼容性查询服务，社区关注度高（1434分、343评论）

items.title: Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock
items.contentSnippet:
Article URL: https://www.tomshardware.com/tech-industry/qatar-helium-shutdown-puts-chip-supply-chain-on-a-two-week-clock
Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=47363584
Points: 679
# Comments: 614
items.creator: johnbarron
items.summary: 卡塔尔氦气供应设施停工，可能导致全球芯片制造业面临材料短缺危机。氦气在半导体制造中用于冷却和清洗等关键工艺，供应链中断已进入两周倒计时。这一事件凸显了芯片制造对关键原材料的高度依赖性，可能对全球科技产业产生连锁影响。
items.ai_reason: 半导体供应链重要新闻，卡塔尔氦气停产直接影响芯片制造，属于高价值产业动态，但与AI技术无直接关联
